verse_text: And some of them were persuaded; and great multitude of the devout Greeks, and not few of the leading women, joined Paul and Silas.

links.context: When Israel--and the Church--receive God's mercy, the news spreads quickly (see [[ACT.17:4]], [[ACT.17:12]]). The prayer for the whole earth is a prayer for the Church to know... the Lord our God.
